title: Additional Biomes
description: Adds a few cool biomes to enhance exploration
body:
About

This mod/datapack adds some cool and unique biomes that can enhance your playthrough.

A Quick Summary of the Features

A quick Video Showcase of some Biomes in this mod/datapack Thease are just a few of the biomes you can find in this mod/datapack.
Redwood Forest

The Redwood Forest

is a pretty common biome that has giant sprouce trees that have a custom trunk system. This biome is pretty simular to the "Old Growth Taiga". Now with even bigger trees in 1.0!

![Redwood Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/772eaf4ae72243054ce1ddfef2a08b8577f67e16.jpeg)
Spruce Grove

The Spruce Grove

is a vast meadow like biome that you can encounter in forested mountainous areas.
If you look hard enough you might even find a vast clearing with a lot of flowers.

![Spruce Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f3c725152171ed1e90538acfec22224e5b82f08.jpeg)
Alpine Spruce Grove

The Alpine Spruce Grove

is a variant of the above mentioned Spruce Grove that has taller and slimmer trees and some red bushes.

![Alpine Spruce Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/biT4zfUG/images/5521278b093f6d09c7c1ab012a4b12af52d29291.jpeg)
Autumn Grove

The Autumn Grove

is an Autumn themed combination between the taiga and the dark forest that spans in colder areas.

![Autumn Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24d6bfdbd77628d06a0f75436772e39e40e3cda4.jpeg)
Violet Grove

The Violet Grove

is a variant of the cherry grove that has dark oak wood and violet leaves.

![Violet Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5aff27d5390e318fb31f7ac7aae58679616a578.jpeg)
Blossom Hills

The Blossom Hills

is a combination of the "Forest hills" and "Cherry Grove" biomes with a few cool flower types sprinkled in.

![Blossom Hills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/biT4zfUG/images/fec166525ef6793567b5eb372a9d26d209cfe470.jpeg)
Lush Jungle

The Lush Jungle

is a jungle variant that combines it with the azalea/lush caves vegetation and the savanna biome.

![Lush Jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4072d91bdcdd9597cb3184d9f7136d03dc24af6e.jpeg)
The Bog

The Bog

is a type of swamp biome that has a very high ammount of grass and frogs.

![The Bog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2bca5696fbb7b2aa75a7cadb41ccf6eacb38f0e.jpeg)
Pale Island

The Pale Island

is a "Pale Garden" biome that generates similarly to the mushroom island.
FUN FACT! this biome has a higher chance to spawn diamonds!

![Pale Island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00367476ad4e73722625da911aa4c44070d92851.jpeg)

This Mod/Datapack should be compatible some Terrain Mods/Datapacks. (Like Tectonic)


Thanks For Checking Out My Mod/Datapack!


If you have any requests/ideas/questions for/about the mod/datapack then DM me on discord
>>"mc_marmaj"<<
